upstreamInputs.vision: Every product I build gets better on its own, every day. I spend my time having ideas and giving feedback. The system handles the rest.
upstreamInputs.whereToPlay: Solo builder (Michael) running 5-10 personal products, each with workstream-level continuous improvement loops, orchestrated via Discord and the build system pipeline.

proposedApproach.name: The Native Loop
proposedApproach.formFactor: Claude Code skills + Discord Channels + Scheduled Agent + Supabase + Next.js Dashboard
proposedApproach.howToWin: The only system where a sentence in Discord becomes a tested, measured, shipped improvement by morning — with zero infrastructure outside Claude Code, Vercel, and Supabase.
jtbdConnections: Capture: Discord Channels — type a sentence, Claude Code picks it up
Enrich: Sparring in Discord thread — clarifying questions, eval mapping
Execute: Scheduled remote agent at 5am — Ralph Wiggum loop
Review: Persistent Next.js dashboard on Vercel, reading from Supabase

constraints: Claude Code Channels must support async Discord listening
Scheduled remote agent requires Claude Code Max
Each workstream needs evals from stage 3
